mapper.select: select id, username, password, phone, email, role, status, create_time from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password, phone, email, role, status, create_time from sys_user where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, username, password, phone, email, role, status, create_time from sys_user order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, phone, email, role, status) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status})
